problem.title: CT-ICP throughput and drift trade-off on the third repository-stored Istanbul sequence
problem.question: Which CT-ICP odometry profile should stay as the current default on a third public Istanbul window while keeping faster and denser alternatives comparable?

variants.label: Balanced window
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the continuous-time baseline.

variants.label: Fast window
variants.intent: Shrink the working set and point budget to improve FPS.

variants.label: Dense window
variants.intent: Increase point density and window richness to preserve more structure.
